task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace is visible, indicating the agent has moved past the login screen.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Custom Emoji administration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Custom Emoji' administration page or settings panel is visible within the Rocket.Chat interface.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the correct image file for the new emoji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker dialog showing the selection of 'emoji_rocket_release.png' from '/home/ga/', or the image preview is visible in the custom emoji creation form.

task_completion.description: The agent named the emoji 'rocket_release' and saved it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The custom emoji list shows a saved entry for 'rocket_release' with the corresponding uploaded image.
The chat window for the '#release-updates' channel is active, with the channel name visible at the top of the chat area.

task_completion.description: The agent posted a message in the channel that includes the newly created custom emoji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message is visible in the '#release-updates' chat history containing the rendered 'rocket_release' custom emoji image.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat graphical interface rather than using terminal API commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web or desktop GUI being actively used (clicks, typing), rather than terminal windows executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The emoji was created through the proper administration interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory includes screenshots of the Administration -> Custom Emoji screen being filled out, proving it wasn't bypassed.

integrity.description: The message was actually posted in the chat interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message appears in the main chat history area of Rocket.Chat, not just typed into the input box without being sent, and not in a separate text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target emoji name: 'rocket_release'. Target image path: '/home/ga/emoji_rocket_release.png'. Target channel: 'release-updates'.
